title: SMT+Cobblemon
description: This addon adds Shin Megami Tensei demons into cobblemon.
body:
An Addon that adds Shin Megami Tensei demons into Cobblemon.
This second version adds Loki: a pure dark type, Gemori, a pure psychic type and Hagen, a Ghost Fighting type.

Thanks to the official Cobblemon discord for the help provided while making this addon.

Place a copy of the data pack in the resources pack folder.

Join the discord server: https://discord.gg/9JFuCg9z
